loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing per-member event counts and worst deviations from the 6 active outgoing feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing event timeline for PRIMARY members (UPS-01 to UPS-06, BPDB-01, BPDB-02); Solar Incomers and Transformers are dark (no data) and omitted from roster.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current draw for 8 outgoing feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no live data) and render as blanks.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel event counts and voltage/current metrics for the 8 primary outgoing feeders; 2 members (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06) are dark (no data) and render as blanks.
